vocabulary.contextTranslation: 普卢默小学五年级教师蒂娜·埃尔南德斯 (Tina Hernandez) 表示，消除对 9-11 的误解对于为年轻学生规划课程至关重要

vocabulary.definition: n. 记忆, 回想, 回忆
vocabulary.context: I wasn't watching the news or anything like that," said Michael Martinez, a 16-year-old junior at Monroe High School in North Hills, who has no recollection of the tragedy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我没有看新闻或类似的东西，"北山门罗高中 16 岁的三年级学生迈克尔·马丁内斯 (Michael Martinez) 说，他对这场悲剧没有任何记忆

vocabulary.definition: n. 预防, 留心, 警戒；v.t. 预先警告
vocabulary.context: Despite the new security precautions implemented in the last decade, many children still fear new attacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管过去十年实施了新的安全预防措施，许多儿童仍然担心新的袭击

vocabulary.definition: adj. 含糊的, 不清楚的, 茫然的
vocabulary.context: Even some older children have only vague memories of Sept.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 即使是一些年龄较大的孩子，对九月二十二日也只有模糊的记忆

vocabulary.definition: n. 撞击器；悬浮微粒的取样器
vocabulary.context: Called a linear impactor, it allows him to collect a more complete set of data.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 称为线性冲击器，它可以让他收集更完整的数据集

vocabulary.definition: adj. （运动员、运动队）居首的，最优秀的
vocabulary.context: After that concussion - his first - his parents bought him a top-ranked helmet.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那次脑震荡（他的第一次）之后，他的父母给他买了一个顶级头盔

vocabulary.definition: adj. sleep的变形
vocabulary.context: People in this sleeplike state are not aware of their surroundings and experiences.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 处于这种睡眠状态的人意识不到他们的周围环境和经历

vocabulary.definition: n. 开球, 开始, 肇始
vocabulary.context: In Houston, Texas, 14-year-old Matthew Hall ran a kickoff drill in football practice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在德克萨斯州休斯顿，14 岁的马修·霍尔 (Matthew Hall) 进行了橄榄球训练的开球训练

vocabulary.definition: adj. 酒醉的, 东歪西倒的, 摇摇晃晃的
vocabulary.context: He left the field light-headed and groggy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他离开赛场时头晕目眩

vocabulary.definition: n. 傀儡, 假人, 仿制品；adj. 虚设的, 假的, 名义上的
vocabulary.context: The engineers placed accelerometers inside each helmet and then strapped it onto a head taken from a crash dummy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 工程师将加速度计放置在每个头盔内，然后将其绑在从碰撞假人身上取下的头上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 倾斜, 倾, (为了修理或清洁)使倾侧；n. 船的倾侧
vocabulary.context: The sled careened off the drive, straight into a tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雪橇从车道上倾斜，直接撞到了一棵树上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 头晕的, 轻浮的
vocabulary.context: He left the field light-headed and groggy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他离开赛场时头晕目眩

vocabulary.definition: n. 头昏眼花；[医] 头晕, 头昏
vocabulary.context: Headaches and dizziness plagued him for weeks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 头痛和头晕困扰了他几个星期

vocabulary.definition: n. 智力活动, 唯理智论
vocabulary.context: After the First World War and the Great Migration, creativity and intellectualism flourished in the predominantly-Black neighborhood of Harlem, in New York City.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一次世界大战和大迁徙之后，创造力和理智主义在纽约市哈莱姆区以黑人为主的社区蓬勃发展

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)过分地单纯化
vocabulary.context: Perhaps, in an oversimplified way, it can be best described as a deliberate arrangement of language in a way that compels someone to think and reflect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许，用一种过于简单化的方式，它可以最好地描述为一种刻意的语言安排，迫使人们思考和反思

vocabulary.definition: adj. 清教徒的, 清教主义的, 宗教上极端拘谨的, 道德上极端拘谨的
vocabulary.context: They rejected the old puritanical idealism of the individual in favor of the spirit of community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们拒绝旧的清教徒式的个人理想主义，转而支持群体精神

vocabulary.definition: n. 修道院, 回廊；v.t. 使与尘世隔绝
vocabulary.context: The Beats, or "Beatniks," cloistered themselves mostly in New York City and San Francisco.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 垮掉的一代，或称"垮掉的一代"，大多隐居在纽约和旧金山

vocabulary.definition: adj. 紧张的, 拮据的, 心情焦躁的
vocabulary.context: Its use of flowery, superfluous language is sometimes regarded as uptight and stuffy today, but was a remarkable embrace of human spirit at its height.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它使用华丽、多余的语言有时被认为是紧张和古板的，但在其鼎盛时期却是对人类精神的非凡拥抱

vocabulary.definition: n. 血统, 直系；[法] 血统, 世系
vocabulary.context: The light of the digital fire burns bright - what stories with ancient lineages will you learn while huddled around it?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 数字之火的光芒燃烧得很明亮--当你挤在它周围时，你会学到哪些古老的血统故事？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 战后的
vocabulary.context: The destruction of World War Two and the invention of atomic weaponry soured the mood of the new post-war generation of American poets known as "The Beat Generation." This period is loosely described as lasting from the end of World War Two to the Vietnam War era.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二次世界大战的破坏和原子武器的发明使被称为"垮掉的一代"的战后新一代美国诗人的情绪恶化。这一时期被粗略地描述为从第二次世界大战结束到越南战争时期

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多余的, 过剩的
vocabulary.context: Its use of flowery, superfluous language is sometimes regarded as uptight and stuffy today, but was a remarkable embrace of human spirit at its height.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它使用华丽、多余的语言有时被认为是紧张和古板的，但在其鼎盛时期却是对人类精神的非凡拥抱

vocabulary.definition: n. 就是孩子到别的小朋友家过夜。( sleepover的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: It started with sleepovers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一切都是从过夜开始的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 半熟的, 未完成的, 准备不足的, 不完整的
vocabulary.context: My people weren't half-baked.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的人民并不是半生不熟的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 单轨的, 偏狭的
vocabulary.context: Our community had a one-track mind each December.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每年十二月，我们的社区都有一个单一的想法

vocabulary.definition: v. 欢乐地唱( carol的现在分词 ); 唱圣诞颂歌
vocabulary.context: Our Brownies Girl Scout troop took us caroling on Christmas Eve.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的布朗尼女童子军在平安夜带我们唱颂歌

vocabulary.definition: n. 肝泥香肠
vocabulary.context: She had dinner with her parents every Friday night, she ate Ashkenazi dishes of liverwurst and gefilte fish, she respected her bubbe, she went to summer camp in the Catskills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她每个周五晚上都和父母一起吃晚饭，她吃德式香肠和鱼丸，她尊重她的宝贝，她去卡茨基尔参加夏令营

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能分的；[化] 不可分的
vocabulary.context: We were inseparable, friends since diapers, and we were convinced nothing would ever change that.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们形影不离，从尿布起就是朋友，我们相信没有什么可以改变这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 盛会, 游行, 虚饰, 露天表演
vocabulary.context: She said she thought I'd come more often than once a month if I wanted to be in the Christmas pageant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她说，如果我想参加圣诞节选美比赛，她认为我每个月来的次数应该不止一次

vocabulary.definition: n. 残骸, 失事, 破坏；[经] (船双等的)失事遭难
vocabulary.context: Kaylee managed to pull me from the wreckage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯莉设法把我从残骸中拉出来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不道歉的, 不认错的； 不辩解的
vocabulary.context: Milk was an outspoken and unapologetic advocate for LGBTQ rights at a time when, in many places throughout the country, same-sex relationships were illegal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 米尔克是 LGBTQ 权利的直言不讳且毫无歉意的倡导者，当时在全国许多地方同性关系都是非法的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 害怕同性恋的
vocabulary.context: Using his newfound political capital, Milk was able to successfully push back against Briggs and defeat the initiative, at a time when homophobic laws were gaining ground elsewhere in the country.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 米尔克利用他新获得的政治资本，成功地反击了布里格斯并击败了这一倡议，当时反同性恋法律正在该国其他地方普及

vocabulary.definition: n. 对同性恋的憎恶（或恐惧）
vocabulary.context: California State Senator John Briggs, encouraged by widespread homophobia and hate, spearheaded a ballot initiative, California Proposition 6, that would fire every openly LGBTQ public-school teacher in the state.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 加利福尼亚州参议员约翰·布里格斯 (John Briggs) 受到普遍的恐同和仇恨情绪的鼓舞，带头发起了一项投票倡议，即加利福尼亚州第 6 号提案，该提案将解雇该州所有公开的 LGBTQ 公立学校教师

vocabulary.definition: adv. 巧妙地, 敏捷地, 便利地
vocabulary.context: In 1977, Milk ran for the Board of Supervisors a third time and won handily.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1977年，米尔克第三次竞选监事会，轻松获胜

vocabulary.definition: n. 手枪
vocabulary.context: On November 27th, 1978, Dan White - a former city supervisor, who was resentful after failing to get his job back - snuck into City Hall armed with a handgun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1978年11月27日，前城市主管丹·怀特（Dan White）因未能重返工作岗位而心怀怨恨，手持手枪潜入市政厅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 岔恨的, 易怨恨的, 不满的, 显然不满的
vocabulary.context: On November 27th, 1978, Dan White - a former city supervisor, who was resentful after failing to get his job back - snuck into City Hall armed with a handgun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1978年11月27日，前城市主管丹·怀特（Dan White）因未能重返工作岗位而心怀怨恨，手持手枪潜入市政厅

vocabulary.definition: n. 声名狼藉, 丑恶；[法] 丧失公权, 剥夺, 臭名昭著
vocabulary.context: For San Francisco, it was a day of infamy."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于旧金山来说，这是一个臭名昭著的日子。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 烈士, 受苦者, 受难者；v.t. 使成为烈士, 使受苦
vocabulary.context: Today, he is seen as a martyr in the gay community but also as a hero and visionary to all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，他被视为同性恋社区的烈士，但也被视为所有人的英雄和有远见的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 邮购的
vocabulary.context: Each mail-order package contains the seed of a new honeybee colony to replace one that has vanished.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个邮购包裹都含有新蜂群的种子，以取代已经消失的蜂群

vocabulary.definition: adj. 针状的
vocabulary.context: He inserted a tiny, needlelike probe into a cell in the mushroom body of each brain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他将一个微小的针状探针插入每个大脑蘑菇体的细胞中

vocabulary.definition: n. 粮秣征收员, 抢劫者
vocabulary.context: This can leave a colony hungry, they conclude - even if the nectar foragers do make it home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们得出结论，这可能会让蜂群挨饿--即使花蜜采集者确实回家了

vocabulary.definition: n. 腰果树, 腰果；[化] ┐如树; 腰果树
vocabulary.context: These insects play a major role in producing all kinds of foods, including berries, apples, almonds, melons, kiwis, cashews and cucumbers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些昆虫在生产各种食物中发挥着重要作用，包括浆果、苹果、杏仁、甜瓜、猕猴桃、腰果和黄瓜

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吸血动物的
vocabulary.context: Among the early suspects: parasites that infiltrate the hives, especially the bloodsucking Varroa (Vuh ROW uh) mite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早期的嫌疑人包括：渗入蜂巢的寄生虫，尤其是吸血瓦螨（Vuh ROW uh）螨

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未受到照顾的, 被忽略了的
vocabulary.context: All four researchers suggest planting native flowers and leaving untended areas in our yards and gardens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有四位研究人员都建议种植本土花卉，并在我们的院子和花园中留下无人照管的区域

vocabulary.definition: n. 垃圾, 杂乱, 轿, 担架；v.t. 乱丢, 铺草, 弄乱；v.i. 产仔, 乱丢垃圾
vocabulary.context: "I walked into a parking lot littered with dead bodies," he recalls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我走进一个满是尸体的停车场，"他回忆道

vocabulary.definition: adv. 迅速地, 轻易地, 乐意地
vocabulary.context: Native bees readily nest in such areas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 本土蜜蜂很容易在这些地区筑巢

vocabulary.definition: v. 再确认, 再次复核( cross-check的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: The geologists then cross-checked the cone shapes they had spotted with Bedmap2 against other types of data.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，地质学家将他们使用 Bedmap2 发现的圆锥形状与其他类型的数据进行交叉检查

vocabulary.definition: adj. 润滑的；n. 润滑物, 润滑油, 润滑剂
vocabulary.context: Flowing water in those channels would then act as a powerful lubricant to speed the ice sheet's motion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些通道中的流动水将充当强大的润滑剂，加速冰盖的运动

vocabulary.definition: n. (仅因出现在出版物上而被信以为真的) 仿真陈述
vocabulary.context: The discovery isn't, however, just a fun factoid about the planet's southernmost continent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，这一发现不仅仅是关于地球最南端大陆的有趣事实

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重建；改造, 重新组装；复原；v.i. 重建
vocabulary.context: Active volcanoes, in contrast, constantly re-build their cones.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相比之下，活火山会不断重建火山锥

vocabulary.definition: n. 裂口, 空隙；v.i. 裂开；v.t. 使分开, 使割开
vocabulary.context: Many rifts around the world - such as the East African Rift zone - have been linked with active volcanoes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 世界各地的许多裂谷 - 例如东非裂谷区 - 都与活火山有关

vocabulary.definition: adj. 畸形的, 残废的, 丑陋的
vocabulary.context: So if the volcanoes were dormant or dead, the moving ice would have erased or deformed that characteristic cone shape.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，如果火山处于休眠状态或死亡状态，移动的冰就会消除或使该特征的圆锥形状变形

vocabulary.definition: adj. 难得到的, 难接近的, 难达成的
vocabulary.context: The new study is a great example of how online data and images can help people make discoveries in inaccessible places, Siddoway now says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西多韦现在说，这项新研究是在线数据和图像如何帮助人们在人迹罕至的地方进行发现的一个很好的例子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 广的, 广泛的, 多方面的；[经] 广大的, 扩大的
vocabulary.context: This may be one of the most extensive volcanic regions on Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这可能是地球上最广泛的火山区之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可分的, 可分割的, 除得尽的；[法] 可分的, 可分割的
vocabulary.context: Each is a prime number, a type divisible only by one and itself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个都是素数，只能被 1 和它本身整除的类型

vocabulary.definition: n. 传送者, 传达人, (疾病的)传播者；[计] 发散机; 发送器
vocabulary.context: Aiming their transmitter at a star cluster on the edge of our galaxy, they sent out a series of pings - 1,679 of them, to be exact.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们将发射器瞄准银河系边缘的一个星团，发出一系列 ping 信号--准确地说，有 1,679 个 ping 信号

vocabulary.definition: adj. 由两部分组成的, 二进位的, 二元的；[计] 二进制的; 二态的; 二进制, 二进制文件传输类型设置命令
vocabulary.context: Back then, they used a binary system: two signals at slightly different frequencies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时，他们使用二进制系统：频率略有不同的两个信号

vocabulary.definition: adj. 周期的, 定期的, 间歇(性)的, 循环的, 用完整句的, 高碘的；[医] 周期性的
vocabulary.context: For instance, he might try to transmit the periodic table of the elements.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，他可能会尝试传输元素周期表

vocabulary.definition: v. 概述, 总结
vocabulary.context: "It's an equation that summarizes what we don't know." Loeb is a physicist at Harvard University in Cambridge, Mass.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是一个总结了我们不知道的东西的方程。"勒布是马萨诸塞州剑桥市哈佛大学的物理学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 前哨, 前哨部队, 前哨基地
vocabulary.context: These scientists use math to figure out whether Earth is likely to be a lonely outpost in space, or one of many inhabited worlds in a universe teeming with life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些科学家利用数学来计算地球是否可能是太空中一个孤独的前哨站，或者是充满生命的宇宙中许多有人居住的世界之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 宇宙的, 宇宙航行的, 无限的, 有秩序的；[医] 宇宙的
vocabulary.context: When he crunched the numbers, Loeb came up with a surprising conclusion: In the scale of cosmic time, the glory days when the universe is full of life might still be far ahead of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当勒布计算这些数字时，他得出了一个令人惊讶的结论：在宇宙时间的尺度上，宇宙充满生命的辉煌岁月可能仍然遥遥领先于我们

vocabulary.definition: n. 煤油, 火油, 灯油；[化] 煤油
vocabulary.context: Another proposed digging a giant trench in the shape of a circle and filling it with kerosene.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一位提议挖一条巨大的圆形沟槽并在其中填充煤油

vocabulary.definition: n. 不敬, 非礼, 不敬行为
vocabulary.context: My younger brother Reza, shouting with joy at the irreverence of furniture out on the street, threw himself onto it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的弟弟雷扎（Reza）对街上的家具不敬而高兴地大喊，然后跳到了上面

vocabulary.definition: n. 放荡, 不检点, 浪费
vocabulary.context: My father had already walked on, shaking his head at what I knew was Western profligacy, at the buying and the throwing out just to buy more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我父亲已经走了，他对我所知道的西方挥霍行为、购买和扔掉只是为了购买更多的行为摇了摇头

vocabulary.definition: adj. 难运转的, 不能实行的
vocabulary.context: The angles of the front door proved unworkable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 前门的角度被证明是行不通的

vocabulary.definition: n. 红木
vocabulary.context: Small rosewood tables and chairs with arabesque shapes inlaid in nacre, and chests that remained empty, done up in a similar fashion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小红木桌椅，带有阿拉伯式花纹，镶嵌在珍珠母中，还有空着的箱子，以类似的方式装饰

vocabulary.definition: n. 钞票
vocabulary.context: I read a story of a bank in Tehran that lost 100 billion rial in banknotes to termites in its vaults."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我读过一个关于德黑兰一家银行的故事，该银行因金库中的白蚁而损失了 1000 亿里亚尔的纸币。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 珠母贝, 真珠质
vocabulary.context: Small rosewood tables and chairs with arabesque shapes inlaid in nacre, and chests that remained empty, done up in a similar fashion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小红木桌椅，带有阿拉伯式花纹，镶嵌在珍珠母中，还有空着的箱子，以类似的方式装饰

vocabulary.definition: adj. 资历过高的
vocabulary.context: He would keep his job as an overqualified administrator, his colleagues wouldn't suspect anything.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他会保住自己作为资历过高的管理员的工作，他的同事不会怀疑任何事情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大洪水前的, 陈旧的, 过时的；n. 大洪水以前的人, 老迈的人
vocabulary.context: Countless antediluvian rugs, which had belonged to a grand uncle who'd grown pomegranates for export.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无数古老的地毯，它们属于一位种植石榴用于出口的叔公

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不可更改地, 不可挽回地, 不可反转地
vocabulary.context: But that day, I hurried past, up our steps and into our home, the dream of a new glamorous existence irreversibly deferred.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但那天，我匆匆走过，走上台阶，走进了家，一种新的、迷人的生活的梦想被不可逆转地推迟了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 进步, 先进, 向前进, 不断前进, 累进, 渐进, 逐渐, 渐次, 主张进步, 进行性
vocabulary.context: Dreams of becoming a poet or a journalist, progressively shift towards mathematics, or dentistry.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 梦想成为诗人或记者，逐渐转向数学或牙科

vocabulary.definition: n. （剧院、公共交通车辆的）站席
vocabulary.context: Word spread through the school and then all of Washington about the Panthers' antics, and the crowd grew from week to week until the bleachers overflowed and it was standing-room only.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 关于黑豹队滑稽动作的消息传遍了学校，然后传遍了整个华盛顿，人群每周都在增加，直到看台上挤满了人，只剩下站着的地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 开始, 着手, 第一拳
vocabulary.context: batted fourth, the cleanup spot, following Ryan at leadoff, then Luis and Marquis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 击球第四，即清理位置，紧随领先的瑞安之后，然后是路易斯和马奎斯

vocabulary.definition: n. 回升时期, 上升, 向上摆动, 跃进；[经] 上升, 向上摆动
vocabulary.context: He leveled off his swing and made contact on a slight upswing: the key to success.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他平稳了挥杆并在轻微上杆时触球：成功的关键

vocabulary.definition: n. 引起杂音的收音机, 大挫折
vocabulary.context: The next Panther popped out, and then Marquis followed with a blooper to first base.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 下一个黑豹突然出现，然后马奎斯紧随其后，带着一垒的花哨

vocabulary.definition: adj. 从未听说的, 无前例的, 前所未闻的, 空前的
vocabulary.context: The team's rating skyrocketed to an unheard-of 8.7 stars, though their record dropped to 8 wins and 5 losses.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管战绩下降至8胜5负，但球队的评分飙升至闻所未闻的8.7星

vocabulary.definition: n. 复赛, 重赛
vocabulary.context: When their archrivals, the Hawks, returned to Parks High for a rematch, the Panthers were ready for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们的宿敌老鹰队回到帕克高中复赛时，黑豹队已经做好了迎接他们的准备

vocabulary.definition: n. (日本徒手自卫武术中使用的)索连棍
vocabulary.context: He took a couple practice swings, then did his best nunchaku moves before setting up and smacking a fastball over the fence - his first homer in four games.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他进行了几次挥杆练习，然后做了他最好的双截棍动作，然后将一个快球打过栅栏--这是他四场比赛中的第一个本垒打

vocabulary.definition: adj. 周游的, 离开正道的, 不定的
vocabulary.context: He watched Jaylen as he chased an errant ball, cartwheeling just before he got to it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他看着杰伦追逐一个跑偏的球，在到达球之前就侧手翻

vocabulary.definition: interj. 再见
vocabulary.context: Ryan twirled to the side, sprinted into the outfield, and waved bye-bye to the Hawks players, who proceeded to chase him around the outfield.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 瑞恩转身到一边，冲进外场，向老鹰球员挥手告别，老鹰球员开始在外场追赶他

vocabulary.definition: n. 漫步, 随笔；v.i. 漫步, 漫谈, 漫游, 蔓延；v.t. 闲逛于
vocabulary.context: For a question about the Cold War Marquis had rambled on and on about the Space Race and didn't even mention communism, the Iron Curtain or Mutually Assured Destruction - pretty big omissions, from what A.J.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于一个关于冷战的问题，侯爵滔滔不绝地谈论太空竞赛，甚至没有提到共产主义、铁幕或相互确保毁灭--相当大的遗漏，来自 A.J.

vocabulary.definition: n. 仓鼠；[医] 仓鼠
vocabulary.context: It's something she showed in tests with hamsters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是她在仓鼠测试中表现出的东西

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使失去方向, 使迷惑
vocabulary.context: This can disorient the turtles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这会让海龟迷失方向

vocabulary.definition: adj. 采光好的，光线好的; 明亮
vocabulary.context: Drawn in, they circle a well-lit building like moths around a streetlight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被吸引，围着一座光线充足的建筑转圈，就像飞蛾围着路灯一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 吉祥物, 晦气
vocabulary.context: For people, Bedrosian says, light at night may offer a "double whammy" - disrupted sleep and risk of disease.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贝德罗西安说，对于人们来说，夜间的光线可能会带来"双重打击"--睡眠中断和患病风险

vocabulary.definition: n. 钠；[化] 钠Na
vocabulary.context: Others were growing at a site lit at night by sodium vapor lights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他植物在夜间用钠蒸气灯照明的地方生长

vocabulary.definition: adj. 电磁的, 由电磁石产生的；[电] 电磁的
vocabulary.context: The electromagnetic spectrum includes all types of light.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 电磁波谱包括所有类型的光

vocabulary.definition: n. 灯泡；[网络] 电灯泡；发光体；电灯用的灯泡
vocabulary.context: And if you - or your parents - are replacing outdoor light fixtures, consider getting some that block the lightbulb from view and direct its light downward, he says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说，如果您或您的父母要更换室外灯具，请考虑购买一些能够挡住灯泡并将其光线向下引导的灯具

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不是存心的, 无心的, 非故意的
vocabulary.context: Sometimes lights that are meant to be helpful pose unintended harms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时，原本有用的灯光会带来意想不到的伤害

vocabulary.definition: n. [地]超大陆
vocabulary.context: Instead of the seven separate continents we have today - North America, South America, Africa, Europe, Asia, Australia, and Antarctica - almost all of Earth's landmass was connected in one fat, C-shaped supercontinent called Pangaea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地球上几乎所有的陆地都连接在一块肥大的、C 形的超级大陆上，称为盘古大陆，而不是我们今天拥有的七个独立的大陆--北美、南美、非洲、欧洲、亚洲、澳大利亚和南极洲

vocabulary.definition: n. 银杏树( ginkgo的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: Forests of evergreens, tall palm tree-like plants, ginkgoes, and ferns provided plant-eaters with plenty to eat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 常绿植物、高大的棕榈树状植物、银杏和蕨类植物的森林为植食者提供了充足的食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 苔藓, 泥沼；v.t. 使长满苔藓
vocabulary.context: Elsewhere, ferns and mosses covered the land.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在其他地方，蕨类植物和苔藓覆盖了土地

vocabulary.definition: adj. (天气)恶劣的, 狂风暴雨的, 风大的
vocabulary.context: They got hit by powerful monsoons, storms with very heavy rainfall and strong, blustery winds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们遭受了强大的季风、暴风雨、强降雨和强风的袭击

vocabulary.definition: adj. 粗笨的；笨重的
vocabulary.context: When your parents were young, TVs were small and boxy, phones were clunky and wired to walls, and computers were way too big to carry around.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你的父母年轻时，电视又小又四四方方，电话笨重且有线连接到墙上，电脑太大而无法随身携带

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有饰边的
vocabulary.context: Horned and frilled dinosaurs, including Triceratops , also made their appearance, as did the heavily armored ankylosaurs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 包括三角龙在内的有角和褶边的恐龙以及重甲甲龙也出现了

vocabulary.definition: n. 慷慨, 宽大, 礼物；[经] 奖励金, 补贴
vocabulary.context: A bounty of good eats!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 丰盛的美食！

vocabulary.definition: n. 比较, 对照, 比喻；[经] 比较, 对比
vocabulary.context: For comparison, we humans have been around for about 6 million years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相比之下，我们人类已经存在了大约 600 万年

vocabulary.definition: n. 无理性; 横逆
vocabulary.context: The men around the room shifted their heavy, satisfying weight of unreasonableness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 房间里的男人们转移了他们沉重的、令人满意的不合理的重量

vocabulary.definition: adv. 谵妄(性), 发狂, 极度兴奋/亢奋, 说胡话, 神志昏迷
vocabulary.context: Arnold began to laugh deliriously making soft, snorting noises, and was thrown off the bed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿诺德开始疯狂地大笑，发出轻柔的鼻息声，然后被从床上扔了下来

vocabulary.definition: n. 知道
vocabulary.context: Andy paused as he was getting into the front seat and gazed back at Arnold, and Arnold saw that his uncle's eyes had absorbed the knowingness from the sheriff's eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安迪在进入前座时停了下来，回头看着阿诺德，阿诺德看到他叔叔的眼睛已经吸收了警长眼中的智慧

vocabulary.definition: n. 偶然
vocabulary.context: Arnold felt his father watching him, and he lifted his eyes with painful casualness to the announcement on the opposite wall, of the Corinth County Annual Rodeo, and then to the clock with its loudly clucking pendulum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿诺德感觉到他的父亲在看着他，他抬起眼睛，痛苦地漫不经心地看着对面墙上的科林斯县年度牛仔竞技表演的公告，然后看着钟摆发出响亮的嘎嘎声

vocabulary.definition: adj. 小于一般尺寸的, 不够大的, 小型的；[化] 尺寸过小的
vocabulary.context: He wondered, as he sat enthralled, if when he got to be Eugie's age he would still be undersized and his hair still straight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他着迷地坐着时，他想知道，当他到了尤吉这个年纪时，他是否仍然身材矮小，头发仍然笔直

vocabulary.definition: n. 慢, 缓慢, 迟延
vocabulary.context: But in a few minutes another fear that they would go to the trouble of calling him and that he would be made conspicuous by his tardiness made him follow his father into the house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但几分钟后，他又担心他们会不厌其烦地打电话给他，担心他的迟到会引起别人的注意，这让他跟着父亲进了屋

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未划线的, 未受挫折的, 不受反抗的, 未戴十字架的；[计] 不交叉的
vocabulary.context: Andy uncrossed his legs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安迪松开交叉的双腿

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有梳过的, 乱蓬蓬的
vocabulary.context: Her short brown hair was uncombed and fell forward across her eyes as she bent her head.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她低下头时，她的棕色短发没有梳理，向前垂到眼睛上

vocabulary.definition: adv. scolding的变形
vocabulary.context: "Where's Eugene?" his mother asked scoldingly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "尤金在哪里？"他母亲责骂地问道

vocabulary.definition: adv. 疲劳地, 累地, 疲倦地
vocabulary.context: At evening when he saw his father stomp tiredly into the house, Arnold did not put down his hammer and leave the chicken coop he was repairing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 傍晚时分，阿诺德看到父亲疲惫地跺着脚走进屋里，他并没有放下锤子，离开正在修缮的鸡舍

vocabulary.definition: n. 倾盆大雨, 豪雨
vocabulary.context: The cloudburst on the horizon, creeping nearer as night settled around them in earnest, rumbled threateningly, as if to punctuate Nova's announcement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地平线上的暴雨，随着夜色认真地降临在他们周围，渐渐逼近，威胁性地隆隆作响，仿佛是在强调诺瓦的宣布

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 作呕, 产生恶感, 厌恶；v.t. 使厌恶, 使恶心
vocabulary.context: It was nauseating to look at.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 看着就令人作呕

vocabulary.definition: pron. [俚]他自己；[俚]其本身
vocabulary.context: Unmoored and alone, Nova had latched on to something for themself, paranormal and misguided though it may be.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺瓦没有停泊，独自一人，为自己抓住了一些东西，尽管它可能是超自然现象和误导的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不明朗的, 不承担义务的
vocabulary.context: Nova made a noncommittal noise.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺瓦发出了不置可否的声音

vocabulary.definition: n. 幻灯片, 幻灯片放映, 播放幻灯片方式
vocabulary.context: "Look," they said, shuffling the clippings and presenting one after another like an analog slideshow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "看，"他们一边说，一边把剪报翻来覆去，像模拟幻灯片一样依次展示

vocabulary.definition: n. 椴木；[化] 椴树
vocabulary.context: Ros followed them beyond the edge of the igloos, sighing as they turned away from the road, weaving through the basswood and beach trees until they paused at the edge of a ravine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗斯跟着他们越过了冰屋的边缘，当他们转身离开道路时叹了口气，穿过椴木和海滩树木，直到他们在峡谷边缘停下来

vocabulary.definition: n. 十字号；adj. 纵横交错的; 交叉的
vocabulary.context: "Hey," Ros said, turning to where they sat criss-cross at the bridge's center, "did you build this?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "嘿，"罗斯转向他们交叉坐在桥中央的地方说道，"这是你建造的吗？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 影印, 复印件；v. 影印
vocabulary.context: She saw small toy cars at the circle's edges, pinning down dark photocopies of what looked to be newspaper clippings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她看到圆圈边缘有小玩具车，上面钉着看起来像是剪报的深色复印件

vocabulary.definition: n. 树木生长线（按海拔标示的树木生长上限）
vocabulary.context: The Mothman glared down at Nova from the treeline before them, brake lights in the dark.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 天蛾人从他们面前的树林线上瞪着诺瓦，黑暗中的刹车灯

vocabulary.definition: adj. 食尸鬼似的, 残忍的
vocabulary.context: Blood had already rushed from their face, rendering them pale and ghoulish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲜血已经从他们的脸上冲了出来，让他们变得苍白而可怕

vocabulary.definition: n. 木工手艺, 木工业, 木器
vocabulary.context: The girls were taught domestic skills (laundry, sewing, cooking, and cleaning), and the boys were taught farming, carpentry, and maintenance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 女孩们学习家务技能（洗衣、缝纫、烹饪和清洁），男孩们学习农耕、木工和维护

vocabulary.definition: adj. 住宅的, 与居住有关的；[法] 有关居住的, 房产的:居所的, 适于居住的
vocabulary.context: A later amendment to the Indian Act created the Indian Residential School (IRS) system.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 后来对《印第安人法案》的修正案创建了印第安人寄宿学校（IRS）系统

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使同化, 吸收, 使相拟, 把...比作；v.i. 被吸收, 被同化
vocabulary.context: In 1876 a law called the Indian Act was passed in order to assimilate First Nations people into white society.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1876年，通过了一项名为《印第安人法案》的法律，旨在将原住民融入白人社会

vocabulary.definition: n. 抑制, 压抑, 制止；[医] 压抑, 抑制
vocabulary.context: In April 2022 Pope Francis apologized for the role of the Roman Catholic Church in the abuse and cultural repression of the residential schools.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2022年4月，教皇方济各为罗马天主教会在寄宿学校的虐待和文化压制中所扮演的角色道歉

vocabulary.definition: n. 同化, 同化作用, 吸收；[化] 同化; 同化作用
vocabulary.context: This policy for dealing with the Indigenous population was called forced assimilation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种对待原住民的政策被称为强制同化

vocabulary.definition: n. 死亡；v.i. 死亡
vocabulary.context: It called upon the federal government to help find and protect the location of deceased residential school children.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它呼吁联邦政府帮助寻找和保护已故寄宿学校儿童的位置

vocabulary.definition: n. 质询, 探索, 调查, 询盘；[计] 询问; 查询
vocabulary.context: The government began the inquiry the following year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 政府于次年开始调查

vocabulary.definition: adj. 收养的, 养育的；v.t. 养育, 抚育, 培养, 鼓励, 抱(希望)
vocabulary.context: The center was established to continue the research of the TRC, to promote public education and understanding of the residential schools, and to help foster reconciliation and healing around the subject.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该中心的成立是为了继续TRC的研究，促进公众教育和对寄宿学校的理解，并帮助促进围绕这一主题的和解与治愈

vocabulary.definition: adj. 娴淑的, 如淑女的, 高雅的
vocabulary.context: It wasn't considered ladylike.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它不被认为是淑女的

vocabulary.definition: n. 轭, 牛轭, 束缚；v.t. 给...上轭, 连接, 结合, 使匹配；v.i. 结合, 匹配；[计] 磁轭; 磁头组; 偏转线圈
vocabulary.context: ...Gold Rush entrepreneur, wrote, "Day after day, week after week, we went through the same weary routine of breaking camp at daybreak, yoking the oxen, cooking our meager rations over a fire of sagebrush and scrub-oak; packing up again, coffeepot and camp-kettle; washing our scanty wardrobe in the little streams we crossed; striking camp again...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...淘金热企业家写道，"日复一日，周复一周，我们经历着同样令人厌倦的例行公事：黎明时分离开营地，给牛套上轭，在山艾树和灌木橡树的火上煮我们微薄的口粮；再次收拾行李，咖啡壶和露营水壶；在我们穿过的小溪中清洗我们简陋的衣柜；再次扎营......

vocabulary.definition: n. 咖啡壶, 小饭店, 午餐柜
vocabulary.context: ...of breaking camp at daybreak, yoking the oxen, cooking our meager rations over a fire of sagebrush and scrub-oak; packing up again, coffeepot and camp-kettle; washing our scanty wardrobe in the little streams we crossed; striking camp again at sunset, or later if wood and water were scarce.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...黎明时分离开营地，给牛套上轭，在山艾树和灌木橡树的火上烹饪我们微薄的口粮；再次收拾行李，咖啡壶和野营水壶；在我们穿过的小溪里清洗我们少得可怜的衣柜；日落时再次扎营，如果木材和水稀缺，则可以稍后再扎营

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无树木的
vocabulary.context: Catherine Haun, who traveled to California in 1849, wrote of traveling through a treeless, arid area of the Great Basin region of Nevada.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯瑟琳·豪恩 (Catherine Haun) 于 1849 年前往加利福尼亚州，她在书中写道，她穿越了内华达州大盆地地区一片没有树木的干旱地区

vocabulary.definition: v. 斥责, 责骂
vocabulary.context: Lavina Porter later wrote, "I would throw myself down on the unfriendly desert and give way like a child to sobs and tears, wishing myself back home with my friends and chiding myself for consenting to take this wild goose chase." The difficulty women faced on the trail has largely been invisible, their voices muffled by stories of cowboys and outlaws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拉维娜·波特后来写道："我会把自己扔到不友好的沙漠里，像个孩子一样哭泣和流泪，希望自己能和朋友们一起回家，并责备自己同意进行这种徒劳的追逐。"女性在这条路上面临的困难在很大程度上是看不见的，她们的声音被牛仔和亡命之徒的故事所掩盖

vocabulary.definition: n. 霍乱；[医] 霍乱
vocabulary.context: Wagons broke down, cattle died, diseases such as cholera swept through wagon trains, and starvation could strike in an instant if supplies ran out and no other sources of food could be found.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马车抛锚，牛群死亡，霍乱等疾病席卷马车，如果补给耗尽且找不到其他食物来源，饥饿可能会立即发生

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不友善地
vocabulary.context: Lavina Porter later wrote, "I would throw myself down on the unfriendly desert and give way like a child to sobs and tears, wishing myself back home with my friends and chiding myself for consenting to take this wild goose chase." The difficulty women faced on the trail has largely been invisible, their voices muffled by stories of cowboys and outlaws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拉维娜·波特后来写道："我会把自己扔到不友好的沙漠里，像个孩子一样哭泣和流泪，希望自己能和朋友们一起回家，并责备自己同意进行这种徒劳的追逐。"女性在这条路上面临的困难在很大程度上是看不见的，她们的声音被牛仔和亡命之徒的故事所掩盖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 缺乏的, 仅有的, 不够的, 狭小的, 吝啬的
vocabulary.context: ...the oxen, cooking our meager rations over a fire of sagebrush and scrub-oak; packing up again, coffeepot and camp-kettle; washing our scanty wardrobe in the little streams we crossed; striking camp again at sunset, or later if wood and water were scarce.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...牛，在山艾树和灌木橡树的火上烹饪我们微薄的口粮；再次收拾行李，咖啡壶和野营水壶；在我们穿过的小溪里清洗我们少得可怜的衣柜；日落时再次扎营，如果木材和水稀缺，则可以稍后再扎营

vocabulary.definition: adj. 控诉的, 指责的；[法] 控诉的, 起诉的, 告发的
vocabulary.context: "I thought you didn't use air conditioning," Susan Landry spoke up, her tone accusatory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我以为你没有使用空调，"苏珊·兰德里说道，她的语气充满了指责

vocabulary.definition: adj. 附近的, 邻近的, 邻人的, 睦邻的
vocabulary.context: So why don't we act a bit more neighborly?" He didn't have to say anything more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么我们为什么不表现得更加睦邻一点呢？"他不需要再说什么了

vocabulary.definition: n. 空有其名的租金, 微不足道的答礼, 空有其名的答礼
vocabulary.context: A thousand ships hovering above the Earth; the Moon had looked like someone had ground up a heap of fresh peppercorns on it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一千艘飞船盘旋在地球上空；月亮看起来就像有人在上面磨碎了一堆新鲜的花椒

vocabulary.definition: adj. 象老鼠的, 多老鼠的, 胆小的
vocabulary.context: "You all know my husband," said Susan Landry, a mousy woman with a penchant for spreading gossip.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你们都认识我的丈夫，"苏珊·兰德里（Susan Landry）说道，她是一个脾气暴躁、喜欢传播八卦的女人

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 剪, 砍伐, 斩；v.i. 下垂, 闲荡；adj. 垂下的；n. 砍伐, 剪下的树枝
vocabulary.context: The crowd followed Edgar's lead, lopping the torches over the fence, aiming for their retreating bodies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人群跟随埃德加的带领，将火把越过栅栏，瞄准他们撤退的尸体

vocabulary.definition: n. 一次回转；v. 加快转速；[计] 反转, 周, 转数
vocabulary.context: Some time later, the sounds outside grew louder, like someone revving up an engine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 过了一段时间，外面的声音越来越大，就像有人在加速引擎一样

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 冒泡, 沸腾；v.t. 使煮沸, 使浸透；n. 翻腾
vocabulary.context: "Sounds a lot like you're messing with our minds," seethed Edgar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "听起来很像你在扰乱我们的思想，"埃德加愤怒地说

vocabulary.definition: n. 墨鱼, 乌贼
vocabulary.context: "We are like the Earth's cuttlefish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们就像地球上的乌贼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能读的, 难辩认的, 平淡无味的, 不值一读的；[计] 难辩认的, 不能读的
vocabulary.context: Strange metallic objects, holograms projecting unreadable alien language, rooms where they locked up unwitting humans and experimented on them?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奇怪的金属物体、投射出无法阅读的外星语言的全息图、他们关押不知情的人类并对他们进行实验的房间？

vocabulary.definition: n. 母牛, 母兽；v.t. 威胁
vocabulary.context: Only her parents and brother seemed to be cowed by her words.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只有她的父母和兄弟似乎被她的话吓倒了

vocabulary.definition: n. 搬弄是非者, 迹象, 指示器；adj. 搬弄是非的, 泄露秘密的, 报警的
vocabulary.context: Such an event would leave a telltale absence of many species in the fossil record.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这样的事件将导致化石记录中许多物种的缺失

vocabulary.definition: n. 生物多样性
vocabulary.context: Narwani wanted to find out just how important biodiversity is for people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纳尔瓦尼想了解生物多样性对人类到底有多重要

vocabulary.definition: n. 生态学, 社会生态学；[化] 生态学
vocabulary.context: Those species losses reflect a major shift in the planet's ecology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些物种的丧失反映了地球生态的重大转变

vocabulary.definition: n. 贡献者, 捐助者, 赠送者, 投稿者；[法] 捐助人, 捐赠人, 投搞人
vocabulary.context: That carbon is a contributor to global warming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 碳是导致全球变暖的一个因素

vocabulary.definition: n. 生态学者
vocabulary.context: So she teamed up with other ecologists to review more than 1,700 studies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，她与其他生态学家合作审查了 1,700 多项研究

vocabulary.definition: n. 微生物, 细菌；[医] 微生物
vocabulary.context: Trees provide oxygen for us to breathe. At the same time, they remove carbon from the air. That carbon is a contributor to global warming. Plants clean pollutants from air and water. Microbes break down waste. Animals disperse seeds that keep forests thriving. A broad range of living resources also provides people with food, shelter and medicine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 树木为我们提供呼吸氧气。同时，它们去除空气中的碳。这种碳是导致全球变暖的一个因素。植物清除空气和水中的污染物。微生物分解废物。动物传播种子，使森林保持繁荣。广泛的生活资源也为人们提供食物、住所和药品

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 分散, 传播, 散开；v.i. 分散；adj. 分散的；[计] 分散
vocabulary.context: Animals disperse seeds that keep forests thriving.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 动物传播种子，使森林保持繁荣

vocabulary.definition: n. 比率, 率, 速度, 价格, 费用, 等级；v.t. 估价, 认为, 鉴定等级, 责骂；v.i. 被评价, 责骂
vocabulary.context: But if current rates of species losses continue, such a mass extinction could occur in just 300 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但如果目前的物种丧失速度继续下去，这样的大规模灭绝可能会在短短 300 年内发生

vocabulary.definition: n. 资源, 财力, 办法, 策略, 急智, 消遣；[计] 资源
vocabulary.context: A broad range of living resources also provides people with food, shelter and medicine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 广泛的生活资源也为人们提供食物、住所和药品

vocabulary.definition: n. 抗原；[化] 抗原
vocabulary.context: To achieve this, the immune system is always on the lookout for evidence of foreign stuff, or what scientists refer to as antigens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了实现这一目标，免疫系统始终在寻找外来物质的证据，或者科学家所说的抗原

vocabulary.definition: n. 水痘；[医] 水痘
vocabulary.context: And it's why a child who had chickenpox as a child won't ever come down with that illness again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这就是为什么小时候患过水痘的孩子永远不会再患这种病

vocabulary.definition: n. 破伤风, 牙关紧闭；[医] 牙关紧闭, 破伤风
vocabulary.context: A simple scratch could be deadly if it became infected with the bacteria responsible for tetanus (or "lockjaw").
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果被导致破伤风（或"牙关紧闭症"）的细菌感染，一个简单的抓伤就可能致命

vocabulary.definition: n. (有机体的)异物
vocabulary.context: To do this, it needs to be able to distinguish elements of itself from outside agents (nonself).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为此，它需要能够将自身元素与外部主体（非自身）区分开来

vocabulary.definition: n. 流行性感冒；[医] 流行性感冒, 流感
vocabulary.context: Influenza viruses are well known for doing this.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 众所周知，流感病毒就是这样做的

vocabulary.definition: n. 白喉；[医] 白喉
vocabulary.context: Before vaccines, many children suffered from debilitating - and killer - illnesses such as measles, polio, smallpox, and diphtheria.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接种疫苗之前，许多儿童患有麻疹、脊髓灰质炎、天花和白喉等使人衰弱和致命的疾病

vocabulary.definition: adj. 鼻的, 鼻声的, 尖锐的；n. 鼻音, 鼻音字
vocabulary.context: Some can be given by mouth or as a nasal spray.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些可以口服或鼻喷雾剂给药

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解除武装, 裁军, 缓和；v.i. 放下武器
vocabulary.context: One is to disarm the threat by locking onto the antigens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一是通过锁定抗原来消除威胁

vocabulary.definition: n. 怀恨者
vocabulary.context: Some see in her tolerance and compassion a secular saint who has been blessed with the gift of forgiveness, but Alice is far more pragmatic - she has seen enough in her life to know all too well that hatred eats the soul of the hater, not the hated."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人在她的宽容和同情心中看到了一位世俗的圣人，她被赋予了宽恕的恩赐，但爱丽丝更加务实--她在自己的生活中看到了足够多的东西，知道仇恨吞噬了仇恨者的灵魂，而不是被仇恨者的灵魂。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不含糊的, 不模棱两可的, 明确的；[法] 不含混的, 明白的, 直率的
vocabulary.context: Alice is unequivocal in stating that music preserved her sanity and her life - while bringing hope into the lives of countless others.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爱丽丝毫不含糊地指出，音乐保存了她的理智和她的生活，同时给无数其他人的生活带来了希望

vocabulary.definition: n. 大提琴演奏家
vocabulary.context: According to the Guardian, after the war Herz-Sommer "went to Israel in 1949 with her sisters and taught music in Tel Aviv before moving to London at the prompting of her son, who had grown up to become a concert cellist but who died suddenly in 2001 while on tour."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据《卫报》报道，战后赫兹-索默"于 1949 年与姐妹们一起前往以色列，在特拉维夫教音乐，然后在她儿子的推动下搬到伦敦，她儿子长大后成为一名音乐会大提琴手，但在 2001 年巡演时突然去世。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 忙碌的, 爱管闲事的, 自负的, 固执己见的, 实际的, 务实的, 国事的, 国务的；[法] 闲断的, 固执己见的, 实用主义的
vocabulary.context: Some see in her tolerance and compassion a secular saint who has been blessed with the gift of forgiveness, but Alice is far more pragmatic - she has seen enough in her life to know all too well that hatred eats the soul of the hater, not the hated."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人在她的宽容和同情心中看到了一位世俗的圣人，她被赋予了宽恕的恩赐，但爱丽丝更加务实--她在自己的生活中看到了足够多的东西，知道仇恨吞噬了仇恨者的灵魂，而不是被仇恨者的灵魂。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 守时地, 按期地, 准时地, 正确地, 精确地
vocabulary.context: Punctually, at 10 a.m., I am sitting there at the piano, with everything in order around me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 上午10点，我准时坐在钢琴前，周围一切都井然有序

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 比喻, 比拟
vocabulary.context: "She speaks with great pride and passion of playing more than 100 concerts inside the concentration camp and she likens that experience, both for the performers and their imprisoned audience, as being close to the divine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "她对在集中营内举办了 100 多场音乐会感到非常自豪和热情，她将这种经历，无论是对于表演者还是被监禁的观众来说，都比作接近神圣

vocabulary.definition: n. 钢琴家, 钢琴演奏者
vocabulary.context: Film director Malcolm Clark and producer Nick Reed - whose Oscar-nominated documentary The Lady in Number 6: Music Saved My Life tells the story of the concerts that Herz-Sommer, a pianist, and others performed in concentration camps to lift the spirits of prisoners - say in a statement that:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 电影导演马尔科姆·克拉克和制片人尼克·里德 - 其获得奥斯卡提名的纪录片《六号女士：音乐拯救了我的生命》讲述了钢琴家赫兹-索默和其他人在集中营举办音乐会以振奋囚犯精神的故事 - 在一份声明中表示：

vocabulary.definition: n. 气质, 性格, 性情；[医] 气质, 禀赋
vocabulary.context: "My temperament.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我的脾气

vocabulary.definition: n. 引用；v.t. 引述, 举证, 报(价)；v.i. 引用
vocabulary.context: On the film's website Herz-Sommer was quoted about the role music played in her life:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在电影网站上，赫兹-索默引用了音乐在她生活中所扮演的角色：

vocabulary.definition: n. 基线, 基准；[计] 基线, 基准
vocabulary.context: Yesterday, Shots reported on a study that found that widely used computerized tests used to establish a baseline of cognitive function for student athletes aren't accurate enough to diagnose concussions, or to determine if a player is safe to return to the action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 昨天，Shots 报道了一项研究，该研究发现广泛使用的用于为学生运动员建立认知功能基线的计算机化测试不足以准确地诊断脑震荡，或确定运动员是否可以安全地返回比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 扫描仪, 扫描盘, 审视者；[计] 扫描器; 词法分析程序; 扫描程序; 扫视程序
vocabulary.context: The researchers also put the players in an MRI scanner to measure their brain activity while the students took a test of thinking and memory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 研究人员还将运动员置于核磁共振扫描仪中，测量他们的大脑活动，同时对学生进行思维和记忆力测试

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可认识的, 可承认的, 可识别的；[法] 可被认出的, 可辩认的, 可被承认的
vocabulary.context: High school football players have changes in their brain function long before they have recognizable signs of a concussion, according to a new study.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一项新的研究表明，高中橄榄球运动员的大脑功能早在出现可识别的脑震荡迹象之前就已经发生了变化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 电脑的；用电脑处理的；电脑化的
vocabulary.context: Yesterday, Shots reported on a study that found that widely used computerized tests used to establish a baseline of cognitive function for student athletes aren't accurate enough to diagnose concussions, or to determine if a player is safe to return to the action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 昨天，Shots 报道了一项研究，该研究发现广泛使用的用于为学生运动员建立认知功能基线的计算机化测试不足以准确地诊断脑震荡，或确定运动员是否可以安全地返回比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 有相互关系的东西, 相关物；v.t. 使有相互关系；v.i. 相关
vocabulary.context: Over time, the changes in brain function that showed up in the MRIs correlated to the number and distribution of hits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，核磁共振成像中显示的大脑功能变化与命中的数量和分布相关

vocabulary.definition: n. 剧烈摇动, 震荡；[医] 震荡
vocabulary.context: High school football players have changes in their brain function long before they have recognizable signs of a concussion, according to a new study.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一项新的研究表明，高中橄榄球运动员的大脑功能早在出现可识别的脑震荡迹象之前就已经发生了变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 严格, 朴素, 激烈
vocabulary.context: The athletes wore special helmets with sensors that measured the number and severity of head impacts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 运动员们戴着带有传感器的特殊头盔，可以测量头部撞击的次数和严重程度

vocabulary.definition: adj. 认知的, 认识的
vocabulary.context: Yesterday, Shots reported on a study that found that widely used computerized tests used to establish a baseline of cognitive function for student athletes aren't accurate enough to diagnose concussions, or to determine if a player is safe to return to the action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 昨天，Shots 报道了一项研究，该研究发现广泛使用的用于为学生运动员建立认知功能基线的计算机化测试不足以准确地诊断脑震荡，或确定运动员是否可以安全地返回比赛

vocabulary.definition: adv. 广泛地
vocabulary.context: They're also looking for a boys' soccer team, to see if they can test the widely held belief that girls are more vulnerable to concussion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还在寻找一支男子足球队，看看是否可以检验人们普遍认为女孩更容易遭受脑震荡的观点
